No. 2/15/2014-BM.—Constitution of ‘Special Committee for Inter-linking of Rivers’, was published in the Gazette of India dated 23.09.2014 as per the directions of Hon’ble Supreme Court order dated 27.02.2012 and Cabinet, in its meeting dated 24th July, 2014, has decided to implement the above directions of the Hon’ble Supreme Court. Now, since the newly formed Telangana State was part of the combined Andhra Pradesh, therefore, Principal Secretary to Government, Irrigation & CAD Department, Telanganga is included in the ‘Special Committee for Inter- linking of Rivers’ in para (i) of Notification dated 23.09.2014 to represent newly created State of Telangana as a Member in ‘Special Committee for Interlinking of Rivers’. Dr. B. RAJENDER, Jt. Secy. (PP) Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
